chapter_title.ar: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ مَشَى مَعَ جَنَازَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 43- Rewards of the one who walks with a coffin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/21)
text: أَوَّلُ مَا يُتْحَفُ بِهِ الْمُؤْمِنُ يُغْفَرُ لِمَنْ تَبِعَ جَنَازَتَهُ .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The first of what the Believer is Bestowed with is the Forgiveness for the one who followed his coffin’.
en.sarwar: 3. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the first gift for a deceased believing person is forgiveness for those who escort him to his grave.”
